home.title: Full Stack Developer & Creative Problem Solver
home.subtitle: Building Digital Solutions That Make an Impact
home.description: I'm a passionate developer specializing in modern web technologies. I create beautiful, functional, and scalable applications that solve real-world problems.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a Full Stack Developer with a passion for creating elegant solutions to complex problems. With expertise in modern web technologies, I turn ideas into reality through clean code and thoughtful design.
about.mission: To build innovative digital products that enhance user experiences and drive business growth through cutting-edge technology and best practices.
about.vision: Continuously evolving as a developer, staying ahead of technological trends while creating meaningful impact through code.

values.title: Clean Code
values.description: Writing maintainable, scalable, and well-documented code that stands the test of time.

values.title: User-Centric
values.description: Prioritizing user experience and accessibility in every project I build.

values.title: Innovation
values.description: Embracing new technologies and methodologies to deliver cutting-edge solutions.

values.title: Collaboration
values.description: Working effectively in teams and communicating clearly with stakeholders.

services.title: Featured Projects
services.description: Here are some of my recent projects showcasing my skills in web development, design, and problem-solving.

services.title: E-Commerce Platform
services.description: Full-stack e-commerce solution with payment integration, inventory management, and admin dashboard. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Stripe API.

services.title: Task Management App
services.description: Real-time collaborative task management application with drag-and-drop functionality, team workspaces, and notification system.

services.title: Portfolio Website
services.description: Modern portfolio website with CMS integration, dynamic content management, and optimized SEO. Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.

services.title: Social Media Dashboard
services.description: Analytics dashboard for social media management with real-time data visualization, scheduling features, and multi-platform integration.

services.title: Restaurant Booking System
services.description: Online reservation system with table management, automated confirmations, and customer reviews. Integrated with WhatsApp API.

services.title: Learning Management System
services.description: Educational platform with video courses, quizzes, progress tracking, and certificate generation. Built for online learning institutions.

gallery.title: Portfolio Gallery
gallery.description: A visual showcase of my work across various projects and technologies.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your vision.
